title: T01a — Stage A Triage Form
description: ~20-question triage form submitted at the start of each engagement. Carries the preview Art. 43 decision. EU AI Act Art. 11, Annex IV §1.

provider_name.description: Legal name of the AI system provider (Art. 11).

deployer_name.description: Legal name of the deployer, if different from provider.

system_name.description: Commercial or internal name of the AI system.

version.description: Semantic version of the AI system under audit.

intended_purpose.description: Intended purpose as described by the provider (Art. 13 §3).

declared_risk_tier.description: Client self-assessed risk tier per Art. 6 / Annex III.

declared_annex_iii_sections.description: Annex III sections the client declares apply to this system.

provider_elects_third_party.description: Whether the provider elects third-party notified-body assessment (Art. 43 §1(b)).

gdpr_overlap.description: Whether the system processes personal data subject to GDPR.

gpai_general_purpose.description: Whether the system is a general-purpose AI model (Arts. 51–55).

special_category_data.description: Whether the system processes special-category data (Art. 10 §5, GDPR Art. 9).

art43_preview.description: Preview Art. 43 decision computed from declared values at Stage A submission.

cgsa_assessment_id.description: UUID of the upstream S4 CGSA assessment, if available.

entity_type.description: FLI-E1. Role(s) the audited party plays under the Act. Multiple values allowed per Recital 83 (Art. 3 §§2–8).

art25_status_change.description: FLI-E2. Modifications that flip a deployer/distributor/importer into a provider under Art. 25 §§1–2.

annex_i_section_a.description: FLI-HR2/HR6. Annex I Section A product categories where the AI system is a safety component. Drives Art. 43 §1(a) notified-body routing.

annex_i_section_b.description: FLI-HR1. Annex I Section B product categories. Routes to sector-specific conformity regimes.

third_party_ca_legally_required.description: FLI-HR3. Whether existing EU sectoral law requires a third-party conformity assessment for the product. Distinct from the provider's voluntary election (provider_elects_third_party).

art6_derogation_claimed.description: FLI-HR5. Declared Art. 6 §3 derogation: provider claims the Annex III system does NOT pose a significant risk of harm.

art6_derogation_rationale.description: FLI-HR5 follow-up. Rationale for the Art. 6 §3 derogation claim (required when art6_derogation_claimed is true).

territorial_scope.description: FLI-S1. Territorial nexus to the Union under Art. 2. If only 'none' is selected the system is out of scope.

gpai_systemic_risk.description: FLI-R1. GPAI model meets the systemic-risk threshold (Art. 51 §2; >10^25 FLOPs or Commission designation per Annex XIII).

art2_exclusion.description: FLI-R2. Art. 2 exclusion category, if any. 'military' and 'third_country_law_enforcement' fully exclude the system.

art5_prohibited_practices.description: FLI-R3. Declared Art. 5 prohibited practices. Any non-'none' value halts the engagement at Stage A.

art50_transparency_triggers.description: FLI-R4. Art. 50 transparency obligations triggered by the system's functions.

is_public_body_or_public_service.description: FLI-R5. Deployer is a public-law body or a private entity providing public services. Triggers Art. 27 Fundamental Rights Impact Assessment when combined with a high-risk system.
